title: 90L Storage Bags, 6Pack Large Capacity Clothes Storage Bags with Zips, Foldable Storage Bags with Reinforced Handle Breathable Thick Fabric for Comforters, Blankets, Bedding
features: LARGE CAPACITY STORAGE BAGS: Each clothes storage bags is 90L Capacity, 60x40x35cm(23.6x15.7x13.7inch). It’s big enough to store clothes,duvets,comforters,blankets,bedding,pillows,quilts,sheets, linens,jackets, off-season clothing, toys, and other household items which you don't often use. Six packs in one set and it's suitable for all kinds of families.

PREMIUM MATERIAL CLOTHES STORAGE BAGS: Each storage bag is made of high-quality odorless and three-ply composite non-woven fabric and it has excellent support. It’s breathable and waterproof and also easy to clean while protecting your clothes from the dust and the mildew. And also can avoid peculiar smells in your pack.. Not easy to tear, can be folded when not in use to ensure multiple reused times.

HANDLE REINFORCEMENT: We found the clothing storage bag's handle falling off is a big problem so we tightened the stitching on the handle. Our storage bag’s handle is stitching with stronger polyester thread. Reinforced seams are also implemented for added strength. Ensure the handle will not break off during use.

CLOTHES STORAGE BAGS WITH ZIPS: Each clothes storage bag use the high quality and smooth zippers. The zipper is still easily slide when the storage box is too full. And the zippers are made of stainless steel which are sturdy. It can be used for a longer period of time.

VERSATILITY: The bedding storage bags set can be used for closet or cloakroom, also a good choice for university dormitory, attic, bedroom use. And there is a transparent window on the front of each storage bag that you can see what is inside easily. You can check and find the clothing easily and quickly through the window.
